columns.extraction_plan: The document defines "biochemical failure" as "PSA progression" (page 3, Procedures section). However, it does not report the median time to PSA progression (TTPSA) as a standalone outcome. The paper reports hazard ratios for "failure-free survival," which is a composite endpoint that includes biochemical failure, but it does not provide median times specifically for biochemical failure or PSA progression.

The document defines "biochemical failure" as "PSA progression" (page 3, Procedures section). However, it does not report the median time to PSA progression (TTPSA) as a standalone outcome. The paper reports hazard ratios for "failure-free survival," which is a composite endpoint that includes biochemical failure, but it does not provide median times specifically for biochemical failure or PSA progression.
